setup.title: Set up your wallet
setup.description: Continue with Privy to create your {{network}} wallet. Privy lets you sign up with an email or connect an existing web3 wallet. Either way, you'll be able to deposit, save, and withdraw USDC.
setup.error: Could not set up your wallet. Please try again.
setup.securityNote: Your wallet settles funds on Monad, and every movement is recorded on the ledger. Sensitive actions like withdrawals require a fresh confirmation.
setup.unavailableDescription: Wallet provisioning isn't configured on this deployment yet. Please check back later.

intro.getReadyDescription: MoolaHub runs on USDC over Monad. Set up your wallet to deposit, save, and withdraw.
intro.manageDescription: MoolaHub runs on USDC over Monad. Add USDC to your wallet, or send it to any Monad wallet address.

receive.title: Receive
receive.subtitle: Add USDC
receive.sendOnly: Send only <0>USDC on {{network}}</0> to this address.
receive.instructions: Send USDC to your address above from any Monad wallet.
receive.instructionsSync: Send USDC to your address above from any Monad wallet, then check for it:

faucet.title: Testnet faucet
faucet.description: Grab test USDC to try things out before real funds.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.subtitle: Send USDC to any Monad address
withdraw.unavailable: On-chain withdrawals aren't available on this deployment right now.

footer.settle: Funds settle to your own Monad wallet address, and every movement is recorded on the ledger with an on-chain reference.
footer.selfCustody: Your wallet is self-custodial. You approve each withdrawal by signing it yourself.
footer.stepUp: Withdrawals and goal payouts require a fresh confirmation (password, 2FA, or emailed code) before anything moves.

banner.title: Connect your wallet for this session
banner.description: Connect once now and you can deposit, save, and withdraw without connecting again until you sign out.

privyWithdraw.connectPrompt: Your wallet is self-custodial. Connect it to sign the withdrawal yourself.

errors.unavailable: On-chain withdrawals aren't available on this deployment.
errors.invalidAddress: Enter a valid Monad address (starts with 0x).
